Footer.summary: Faris Rashad English Trainer helps serious learners build structured, confident, measurable English across IELTS, business, general fluency, and teacher development.
Footer.note: Preply is the main booking destination. Lead forms collect interest for courses, webinars, training, placement tests, and updates.

NotFound.title: That page is not available.
NotFound.description: The route may have changed. Return home and choose the right path from there.

LeadForm.title: Register your interest
LeadForm.description: Tell Faris what you need. You can also book directly on Preply if you are ready now.

fields.consent: I consent to being contacted about my inquiry.

placeholders.goal: Briefly describe your goal, timeline, or challenge.

helper.contact: Add WhatsApp or Telegram. At least one contact method is required.
helper.email: Optional for course leads and recommended for webinar registrations.
helper.privacy: Your submission is used only to respond to this inquiry.

LeadForm.success: Your inquiry was received. You can also book on Preply for the fastest next step.
